PREFIX psv: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?consoleLabel ?cpuLabel ?storageLabel ?memoryLabel ?graphicsLabel ?backwardLabel WHERE {
  ?console wdt:P31 wd:Q104247 ; wdt:P4815 wd:Q22771 ; rdfs:label ?consoleLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?consoleLabel) = 'en')
  OPTIONAL {
    ?console wdt:P1759 ?cpu .
    ?cpu rdfs:label ?cpuLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?cpuLabel) = 'en')
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?console p:P2048 / psv:P2048 ?storageNode .
    ?storageNode wikibase:quantityValue ?storageValue .
    ?storageNode wikibase:quantityUnit ?storageUnit .
    ?storageUnit rdfs:label ?storageUnitLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?storageUnitLabel) = 'en')
    BIND(CONCAT(STR(?storageValue) , " " , ?storageUnitLabel) AS ?storageLabel)
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?console p:P2001 / psv:P2001 ?memoryNode .
    ?memoryNode wikibase:quantityValue ?memoryValue .
    ?memoryNode wikibase:quantityUnit ?memoryUnit .
    ?memoryUnit rdfs:label ?memoryUnitLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?memoryUnitLabel) = 'en')
    BIND(CONCAT(STR(?memoryValue) , " " , ?memoryUnitLabel) AS ?memoryLabel)
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?console wdt:P4591 ?graphics .
    ?graphics rdfs:label ?graphicsLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?graphicsLabel) = 'en')
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?console wdt:P2658 ?backward .
    ?backward rdfs:label ?backwardLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?backwardLabel) = 'en')
  }
}
